What Beck's does

Garden design, landscape construction, paving & retaining walls, turf & planting, irrigation, outdoor lighting, fencing & gates, garden maintenance.

How Beck's works

One team, from the site visit to handover.

No handoff between a designer, a builder and a maintenance crew. The people who quote the job are the people who do it.

STEP 01
📍

Site visit

We walk the property with you and talk through what you want the garden to do.

STEP 02
✏️

The plan

One plan, costed and scoped, before anything is dug up.

STEP 03
🛠️

The build

The same team that designed it does the construction and the planting.

STEP 04
🌿

Handover

A finished garden, walked through with you, with the maintenance conversation had upfront.

The team
